content.scenarioHint: 你走进一家咖啡馆，注意到吧台上有一杯咖啡的拉花非常精美，你想以此为话题开启与咖啡师的对话，自然地表达赞美并询问制作过程。
expectedAnswers: Wow, that latte art is amazing—did you make that?
The design on this coffee is so cool, is it your creation?
I’ve never seen such detailed latte art before—do you usually do this?
That’s incredible! Are you the one who made this pattern?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否通过观察环境自然地发起对话并表达兴趣
语言准确性：语法结构正确，用词恰当，无明显错误
表达自然度：符合英语母语者日常口语习惯，语气亲切不生硬

content.scenarioHint: 你在咖啡馆里，注意到旁边的人正在读一本村上春树的小说，你想借此开启一段轻松的对话，打破沉默。
expectedAnswers: You're reading Murakami? I just finished 1Q84—what a ride!
Oh, Murakami too? I finished 1Q84 last week. Have you read any of his other books?
I see you're into Murakami! I just finished 1Q84. What’s your favorite of his novels?
Small world—I’m also reading Murakami right now. Did you finish 1Q84? I thought the ending was wild!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否通过观察对方阅读内容自然开启对话并表达共同兴趣
语言准确性：语法正确，时态使用恰当，无明显拼写或结构错误
表达自然度：符合英语母语者在咖啡馆等轻松场合的口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'Murakami' 和 '1Q84' 等场景核心词汇

content.speakerText: I noticed you’re carrying a guitar case—do you play?
content.speakerTextCn: 我注意到你带着吉他包——你会弹吗？
expectedAnswers: Yeah, I’ve been playing for five years. Just practicing for an open mic next week!
Not really—I’m just carrying it for a friend. But I’d love to learn!
Actually, I play jazz on weekends. Do you like music?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否基于观察自然开启对话并回应对方提问
语言准确性：是否正确使用了进行时、完成时等时态
表达自然度：是否使用了真实口语表达（open mic, not really, actually）
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 guitar / play / carry / practice 等场景关键词
